en.title: CV
en.description: A compact CV page for education, research direction, selected projects, and writing output. It is meant to be browsable first and downloadable once the final PDF is ready.
en.downloadNote: Attach a final PDF here when it is ready. Until then, this page acts as the readable web version.

sections.title: Education
items: Research interest: embodied intelligence, LLMs, and robotics

zh.title: CV
zh.description: 这是一个偏可阅读的网页简历页，用来整理教育背景、研究方向、代表项目与写作输出；等正式版准备好后，再补充 PDF 下载。
zh.downloadNote: 正式简历 PDF 准备好后可以直接挂在这里；在此之前，这一页先承担可浏览版简历的作用。

sections.title: 教育背景
